audit_items.proof_trace: At throw L295, resources[idx].contents and import_stack.back()->source do alias the same allocation, but the destructor's loop-2 calls sass_import_take_source (L129) which ZEROES import->source before calling sass_delete_import (L131), so sass_delete_import frees free(0) — a no-op. The actual free happens exactly once in loop-1 via free(resources[i].contents). No double-free and no leak occur because resources.push_back (L257) precedes the throw, ensuring the destructor always frees the buffer through the resources vector.
